nasb.text: Say among the nations, “The Lord reigns; Indeed, the world is firmly established, it will not be moved; He will judge the peoples with equity.”

esv.text: Say among the nations, “The Lord reigns! Yes, the world is established; it shall never be moved; he will judge the peoples with equity.”

cnv.text: 你們要在萬國中宣告：“耶和華作王！” 世界就堅定，必不動搖； 他必按著公正審判萬民。

ccb.text: 要告诉列国： “耶和华掌权， 祂使大地坚立不摇， 祂必公正地审判万民。”

csbs.text: 你们当在列国中说：“耶和华作王， 世界就被确立，不致动摇； 他必以正直审断万民。”
